violations.text: A spray bottle with Chlorine sanitizer solution (labeled bleach/water) was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. The bleach/water mixture was adjusted to the proper range of 50-100ppm at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
Several Spray bottles were observed to have faintly/worn labeled names. Bottles are to be clearly marked with the common name of the chemical contents. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Single service items were observed not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or inverted to prevent possible contamination. If packaging is removed, remaining items are to be stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
The sprayer/faucet to the 3 bay sink was observed to be leaking/dripping between times of use. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine/bleach sanitizing solution for the low temp dish machine and the bleach/water spray bottle(s). New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

At the time of inspection, the new Outdoor Bar area was observed to be lacking a hand-washing sink. Hand Sink is to be installed to facilitate proper handwashing at times of use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
Cases of food items were observed stored on the floor in the storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

At the time of inspection, the new Outdoor Bar area was observed to be lacking a 3 Bay Sink. A sink with at least 3 compartments shall be provided for manually washing, rinsing, and SANITIZING EQUIPMENT and UTENSILS. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2024
